subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my Lord and my Support! I beseech Thee by the Name through which the Sun of Utterance hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و سیدی و سندی اسئلک بالاسم الذی به اشرقت شمس البیان من افق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God
